rationale: Initial candidate RewardSpec based on the schema. Uses smooth shaping via exponential of distance, penalizes velocities, angle deviations, and engine usage, and gives a terminal success bonus for safe landing.

components.description: Encourage moving toward the landing pad at (0,0) by rewarding exponential of negative distance.
Penalize high horizontal and vertical velocities.
Penalize large angle and angular velocity.
Penalize main engine and side engine usage.

components.expression: 10.0 * float(done and obs[6] > 0.5 and obs[7] > 0.5 and abs(obs[0]) < 0.1 and abs(obs[1]) < 0.1 and abs(obs[2]) < 0.1 and abs(obs[3]) < 0.1 and abs(obs[4]) < 0.1)
components.description: Large bonus for successful landing with both legs grounded, near pad, low velocity, upright angle.
